We thank you for giving us the opportunity to submit our proposal for the above-menꢁoned project. Our  
proposal is based on Standard Design Criteria, Material Speciﬁcaꢁons, Terms, Condiꢁons of Sale, and  
Standard Panel Colours as per 'INDSTAAL standard'. However, the overall dimensions and layout are in  
general in accordance with your inquiry. Our Team intends to comply with your project requirements. Our  
scope of work covers the design, engineering, fabricaꢁon, supply and erecꢁon of the pre-Engineered steel  
building in strict compliance with the standards and speciﬁcaꢁons. We are very keen to secure the order  
for this project and we look forward to do the business with you. We trust you will ﬁnd that our proposal is  
inlinewithyour requirements and lookforward to your valuedorder.  
Yours Sincerely,  
Mr. Harsh Shah

1.  
2.  
21  
Special notes  
470mm wide Skylights & wall lights are  
considered as per previous building.  
Assuming present provided purlins are  
overlapping with exisꢁng purlins but it also  
has to be checked at site.  
3.  
4.  
5.  
For crane, the tandem operaꢁon has been  
considered only along crane travel length,  
but not with the lateral cranes.  
Max 100MT crane capacity will run at a ꢁme  
in single bay, the other in the other bays should  
be at rest.  
cable tray is considered along AX:1A/A-A6  
GL-1A-1/A, with bracket & supporꢁng  
structure too.  
6.  
7.  
8.  
Roof monitor is considered along GL-A-A5 at  
ridge line.  
1.5m ht Sheeted louvers are considered  
around the building except Ax-1-12/А.  
For mezz,only load are considered and its  
anchor bolts are considered in current scope.  
9.  
Fascia is considered along Ax-12/A-A6  
10.  
0.8m walkway is considered with 5mm  
thick chequered plate & handrails along  
Ax-A2/1A-12 & A4/1A-12.  
11.  
#1 no of cage ladder is considered for roof  
access & #2 no of cage ladder is considered  
for crane walkway.  
12.  
13.  
14.  
No portal bracing is considered as there is no  
portal bracing are shown in 3d strucad model.  
Please conﬁrm the bracing locaꢁon & condiꢁons  
which are menꢁoned in proposal drawing.  
12mm dia sag rods are considered.

#IND-HS-25-691  
a
b r a n d o f P R E S T E E L L L P  
15.  
16.  
17.  
3 mm MS guꢀer is provided with one PVC  
down take and a galvalume covering at each  
column. On the opposite side, a galvalume  
guꢀer is provided with two PVC down takes,  
each with galvalume covering at every column.  
The exisꢁng columns along the GL-A are  
failing aꢂer checking for the new cranes  
loads for which the columns need to be  
strengthened, no addiꢁonal weight  
considered for this in the given weight.  
Exisꢁng building cold form only we can  
reuꢁlise, Sheeꢁng and louver we can't reuꢁlised.  
18.  
19.  
All columns are considered the ﬁx base  
Except crane beam, all columns and raꢂers  
considered single sided welding.

Secꢀon - 3 : Design Code Details  
1. Building is designed as per AISC-360-2010.  
2. Wind-Load applicaꢁon as per IS875 (Part-3): 2015.  
3. Seismic zone is as per IS: 1893-2002.  
4. Minimum Thickness for Primary Secꢁon is 5 mm & Secondary  
Secꢁon is 1.5 mm respecꢁvely. Min thickness.  
5. Zone Factor: 0.16.  
6. Importance Factor: 1.00.

01

1.2 Force Majeure  
01  
Seller Shall Not Be Liable For Any Loss Or Damage To Buyer For Delay In Delivery  
Or Cancellaꢁons Of Any Purchaser's Order By Seller Due To Circumstances  
Beyond Seller's Control, Such As, But Not Limited To, War, Riots, Civil Commoꢁon,  
Revoluꢁon, Government Regulaꢁons, Orders Or Acts Of Any Government Authority  
Directly Or Indirectly Interfering With Or Rendering More Burdensome The  
Producꢁon Or Delivery Of The Products, Floods, Fires, Delays Due To Transporter's  
Strike And Any Other Circumstances Or Event Beyond Seller's Control  
1.3 Permits  
01

install any product

Secꢀon - 10 General Terms & Condiꢀons  
1.4 Inspecꢀon of Product  
01  
Buyer Agrees To Inspect Upon Arrival Of All Arꢁcles Shipped. Claims For Shortage  
Or Defecꢁve Material, If Not Packaged, Must Be Made In Wriꢁng To ABIL Sales  
Oﬃce Within Five Days Aꢂer The Receipt Of The Shipment, And If Packaged Within  
30 Days Aꢂer Receipt Of Shipment INDSTAAL Shall Have A Reasonable Time To  
Invesꢁgate All Claims Made By BUYER. Any Claims for Shortages or Defects Made  
Aﬁer The Above Periods Shall Be Refused And Finally Dismissed  
1.5 Erecꢀon Drawing  
01  
INDSTAAL STRUCTURE The SELLER Will Furnish The BUYER With All Standard  
Erecꢁon Drawings Required For The Erecꢁon Of The Buildings. The SELLER Will  
Also Furnish The BUYER With Anchor Bolts Seꢃng Plans And Column Base Reacꢁons  
1.6 Changes in Speciﬁcaꢀons  
01  
SELLER Reserve the Right the Modify the Design of His Standard Building and to  
Subsꢁtute Material Equal to That Originally Speciﬁed (In Order To Permit  
Incorporaꢁon of Changes and Improvements, In the Conꢁnued Development of  
SELLER'S Product).  
1.7 Cancellaꢀon  
01  
BUYER CANNOT Cancel Order, Without First Reaching An Agreernent In Wriꢁng  
With SELLER Covering All The Damages. If Cancellaꢁons or Modiﬁcaꢁons is Agreed  
To By SELLER, BUYER Agrees To Pay All Engineering and Other Expenses, Incurred  
By SELLER and In Any Case Not Less Than 5% Of The Agreement Price In Case Of  
Cancellaꢁons  
1.8 Producꢀon Release  
01  
That Porꢁon Of The Order That Is Not Shipped Within 2 Months From The Date Of  
Contract Purchase Order Will Be Subject To Price Increase.  
1.9 Warranty  
01  
"INDSTAAL" Products Are Warranted Against Any Failure Due To Defecꢁve Material  
Or Workmanship For A Period Of ONE Year

01

2.2 Governing Laws  
01  
This Agreement Shall Be Construed And Enforced In Accordance With And Under  
The Laws Of The Government Of India. Both Parꢁes Agree That In Any Case Of Any  
Diﬀerence Or Dispute Between The SELLER And The BUYER Will Be Resolved By  
Mutual Discussions And Agreement. However, Unresolved Issues, If Any, Will Be  
Seꢀled By Arbitraꢁon As Per The Indian Arbitraꢁon And Conciliaꢁon Act, And The  
Venue Of The Arbitraꢁon Will Be In Ahmadabad.
